login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your administrator email and password.
login.errorNetwork: Network error. Check that the API is running.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.sent: If an account exists, check the server logs for the reset link (development).

alerts.businessRucMissing: Add a valid business RUC to issue invoices.
alerts.fiscalExpiringSoon: Your fiscal stamp (timbrado) expires in less than 30 days.
alerts.fiscalLowRange: Less than 10% of invoice numbers remain in the current range.
alerts.fiscalNoActiveStamp: No active fiscal stamp. Go to Settings → Timbrado to add and activate one.
alerts.fiscalExpiredOrExhausted: The fiscal stamp is expired or the number range is exhausted. Add a new stamp under Settings → Timbrado.

businessSettings.title: Business settings
businessSettings.lead: Name, tax ID (RUC), contact details, and logo used on invoices and PDFs. Changes apply only when you save.
businessSettings.saveError: Could not save. Check your data and try again.
businessSettings.rucHint: Format: digits, hyphen, digits (e.g. 80000005-6). Leave empty if not set yet.
businessSettings.rucInvalid: Invalid RUC. Use only digits, one hyphen, one or more digits (e.g. 80000005-6).
businessSettings.logoTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum size is 1.5 MB. Use a smaller PNG or JPEG file.

fiscalStamp.title: Fiscal stamp (timbrado)
fiscalStamp.lead: Register the stamp authorized by the tax office (SET), validity dates, and the invoice number range. Only one stamp can be active at a time.
fiscalStamp.saveError: Could not save. Check your data and try again.
fiscalStamp.empty: No stamps yet. Add one below.
fiscalStamp.stampNumberHint: Digits only, as assigned by SET (e.g. 12345678).
fiscalStamp.stampNumberInvalid: Enter digits only for the stamp number (e.g. 12345678).
fiscalStamp.initialEmissionHint: Must be within the from–to range (e.g. continue from a previous system).
fiscalStamp.lockedHint: This stamp was used on invoices; the stamp number and range cannot be changed. Deactivate it and add a new stamp.
fiscalStamp.rangeOrder: The “to” number must be greater than or equal to “from”.
fiscalStamp.validUntilBeforeFrom: The end of validity must be after the start date.
fiscalStamp.initialEmissionRange: Must be between {{from}} and {{to}} (inclusive). Example: if the range is {{from}}–{{to}}, use {{from}} to start at the beginning.

placeholder.title: Coming soon
placeholder.body: This area will be wired to the API in the next iteration.

apiErrors.GENERIC: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
apiErrors.UNAUTHORIZED: You must be signed in to perform this action.
apiErrors.INVALID_SCHEDULE_RANGE: Invalid schedule range. Start must be before end.
apiErrors.SCHEDULE_OVERLAP: Schedule overlaps for the selected day.
apiErrors.PHOTO_TOO_LARGE: Photo image is too large. Maximum size is 1.5 MB.
apiErrors.INVALID_RUC_FORMAT: Invalid RUC format. Use digits, hyphen, and digits (e.g. 80000005-6).
apiErrors.LOGO_TOO_LARGE: Logo image is too large. Maximum size is 1.5 MB.
apiErrors.LOGO_INVALID_FORMAT: Logo must be an image file (data:image/...).
apiErrors.CATEGORY_INACTIVE: The selected category is inactive. Please choose an active category.
apiErrors.STAMP_LOCKED_AFTER_INVOICE: Cannot edit this stamp because it has already been used on invoices. Deactivate it and add a new stamp.
apiErrors.STAMP_NUMBER_DIGITS_ONLY: Stamp number must contain digits only (e.g. 12345678).
apiErrors.VALIDITY_END_BEFORE_START: The end of validity must be after the start date.
apiErrors.INVALID_NUMBER_RANGE: Invalid number range. The "to" value must be greater than or equal to "from".
apiErrors.EMISSION_OUT_OF_RANGE: The emission number must be within the from–to range.
apiErrors.INVALID_TOKEN: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
apiErrors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.
apiErrors.BUSINESS_RUC_REQUIRED_FOR_PDF: A valid business RUC is required to generate invoice PDFs.
apiErrors.INVOICE_PDF_ONLY_FOR_ISSUED: Invoice PDF is only available for issued invoices.
apiErrors.INVALID_REQUEST: The request is invalid. Please review your input.

services.title: Services
services.lead: Manage categories and services for scheduling and invoicing.
services.saveError: Could not save. Check your data and try again.

categories.name: Name
categories.emptyBody: Create a category to start defining services.

services.name: Name
services.emptyBody: Create a service to use it in appointments and invoices.

professionals.title: Professionals
professionals.lead: Manage salon professionals and their weekly schedules.
professionals.saveError: Could not save. Check your data and try again.
professionals.emptyBody: Create a professional to assign them to appointments.

form.scheduleLead: Set working hours for each day (HH:MM).
form.scheduleInvalid: Invalid schedule. Use HH:MM for all days (e.g. 09:00).
form.scheduleRangeInvalid: Invalid schedule range. Start must be before end (e.g. 09:00–17:00).

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Sign up with email or Google.
signup.passphraseHint: Prefer a long, memorable phrase (for example forest-blue-coffee-2026). At least 14 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check that the API is running.
errors.PASSWORD_MISSING_UPPERCASE: Add at least one uppercase letter.
errors.PASSWORD_MISSING_LOWERCASE: Add at least one lowercase letter.
errors.PASSWORD_MISSING_SYMBOL: Add at least one symbol (for example ! or -).
errors.PASSWORD_WEAK_OR_COMMON: This password is too common. Choose something more unique.
errors.PASSWORD_SEQUENTIAL: Avoid obvious sequences like 12345 or abcde.
errors.PASSWORD_CONTAINS_BRAND: Do not include company or brand names in your password.
errors.PASSWORD_CONTAINS_USER_INFO: Do not include your email or name in your password.
errors.INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT: Please provide a valid email address.
errors.INVALID_REQUEST: The request is invalid. Please review your input.
errors.OAUTH_CODE_INVALID: Your Google sign-in session expired. Please try again.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in with email or Google.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check that the API is running.
errors.GOOGLE_ACCOUNT_USE_GOOGLE: This account uses Google sign-in. Use “Continue with Google” instead.
errors.INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT: Please provide a valid email address.
errors.INVALID_REQUEST: The request is invalid. Please review your input.
errors.OAUTH_CODE_INVALID: Your Google sign-in session expired. Please try again.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.
errors.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: This account is locked. Contact support if you need help.
errors.ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have access to this action.

login.oauthAccountLocked: Your account is locked. Contact support if you need help signing in.

callback.missingCode: Missing sign-in code. Try signing in with Google again.
callback.exchangeFailed: That sign-in link expired or was already used. Please try again.

oauthErrors.oauth_failed: Google sign-in did not complete. Please try again or use email signup.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
reset.missingToken: This reset link is missing a token. Request a new reset from your administrator.
reset.success: Your password was updated. You can sign in with your new password.
reset.genericError: We could not update your password. Try again or request a new link.

errors.RESET_TOKEN_INVALID: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
errors.PASSWORD_MISSING_UPPERCASE: Add at least one uppercase letter.
errors.PASSWORD_MISSING_LOWERCASE: Add at least one lowercase letter.
errors.PASSWORD_MISSING_SYMBOL: Add at least one symbol (for example ! or -).
errors.PASSWORD_WEAK_OR_COMMON: This password is too common. Choose something more unique.
errors.PASSWORD_SEQUENTIAL: Avoid obvious sequences like 12345 or abcde.
errors.PASSWORD_CONTAINS_BRAND: Do not include company or brand names in your password.
errors.PASSWORD_CONTAINS_USER_INFO: Do not include your email or name in your password.

layout.heading: System administration
layout.lead: Provision tenants, assign tenant administrators, and run cross-tenant user support (password reset email and account lock). SYSADMIN is granted only via database script.

home.tenantsDescription: Create organizations and manage subdomain keys.
home.tenantsHint: Short names are stored lowercase and validated as DNS labels.
home.usersDescription: Search users by email, send password reset links, lock or unlock accounts.
home.usersHint: Password reset applies only to accounts with a local password.

tenants.createDescription: Legal identity, administrative contact (name and phone required; email optional), optional technical contact, and unique short name (subdomain key) and ID number.
tenants.shortNameHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only. No leading or trailing hyphen.
tenants.technicalContactHint: Optional. Leave blank if you do not have a technical contact.

errors.SHORT_NAME_MUST_BE_LOWERCASE: Short name must use lowercase letters only.
errors.SHORT_NAME_INVALID_DNS_LABEL: Short name must be a valid single DNS label (1–63 characters, letters, digits, hyphens, no leading or trailing hyphen).
errors.SHORT_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: This short name is already in use.
errors.ID_NUMBER_ALREADY_EXISTS: This ID number is already in use.
errors.TENANT_DUPLICATE_KEY: A unique field conflicts with an existing tenant.

tenantDetail.heading: Tenant #{{id}}
tenantDetail.searchHint: Search the user directory by email. Users who have not registered will not appear.
tenantDetail.removeConfirmDescription: This revokes tenant admin access for this tenant.
tenantDetail.removeConfirmBody: Remove {{email}} as tenant admin for this tenant?

errors.LAST_ACTIVE_TENANT_ADMIN: At least one active tenant administrator is required.
errors.TENANT_ADMIN_ALREADY_ASSIGNED: This user is already a tenant admin for this tenant.

users.heading: User support
users.lead: Search by email, then trigger a password reset (local-password accounts only), lock, or unlock.
users.searchHint: Enter at least two characters. Matches are based on email.
users.resetInitiated: Password reset email was sent (check server logs in this PoC environment).

errors.NO_LOCAL_PASSWORD: This account has no local password (for example Google-only). Use identity-provider recovery instead.

layout.lead: Manage contractors, services, assignments, and published planning for this tenant.

entry.noAccessBody: Your account is not an active tenant administrator for any organization. Ask a system administrator to assign you, or continue to the main app.
entry.pickLead: You are a tenant administrator for more than one organization. Select one to continue.

dashboard.heading: Tenant workspace
dashboard.lead: Open a section to manage this tenant.
dashboard.contractorsDesc: Link users by email, remove, or inactivate within this tenant.
dashboard.catalogDesc: Categories, services, client price, and contractor cost (fixed or % of client price).
dashboard.assignmentsDesc: Choose which services each contractor may provide (replace-on-save).
dashboard.planningDesc: Draft availability by day and time, publish a month, copy to the next month.

contractors.heading: Contractors
contractors.lead: Contractors must already have a platform account. Search by email, then add them to this tenant.
contractors.emailPlaceholder: Type part of the user email
contractors.searchMinChars: Enter at least two characters to search.
contractors.noUserHint: No matching users. The person must register before they can be added as a contractor.
contractors.removeConfirmDescription: Their service assignments and planning rows for this tenant are removed. Their platform account is unchanged.

errors.USER_MUST_REGISTER_FIRST: That user is not registered yet.
errors.CONTRACTOR_ALREADY_LINKED: This user is already a contractor for this tenant.

catalog.heading: Service catalog
catalog.lead: Create categories, then services with client price and contractor cost.
catalog.needCategoryFirst: Create at least one category before adding services.

errors.DUPLICATE_CATEGORY_NAME: A category with this name already exists.
errors.DUPLICATE_SERVICE_NAME: A service with this name already exists.
errors.INVALID_CLIENT_PRICE: Client price must be zero or greater.

assignments.heading: Contractor service assignments
assignments.lead: Saving replaces the full set of allowed services for the selected contractor (add and remove in one action).
assignments.replaceHint: Check the services this contractor may provide, then save. Unchecked services are removed from their assignment.
assignments.savedReplaceHint: Assignments saved. The list you saved now defines which services this contractor may provide.

planning.heading: Planning
planning.lead: Draft planning until you publish the month. Published months are read-only here; copy the prior month into the next as draft to adjust.
planning.copiedTo: Copied to {{target}}. Omitted {{omitted}} row(s) for missing or inactive contractors.
planning.readOnlyHint: This month is published. Draft changes are blocked; copy to the next month to build a new draft.
planning.monthViewHint: Showing all assignments in the selected calendar month.

app.title: Component gallery
app.lead: Reusable primitives built with React and Tailwind CSS—buttons, forms, feedback, and layout patterns you see in modern web apps.

icons.hint: SVG icons for search, menu, user, and chevron—use inside buttons, inputs, and navigation.

typography.body: Body text uses a comfortable line length for reading.
typography.muted: Muted supporting copy for secondary details.

alerts.infoBody: You can combine title and body copy for inline messages.
alerts.warningBody: You are approaching the limit of your plan.
alerts.destructiveBody: Update your billing method and try again.

table.hint: Sort by clicking headers, drag the grip to reorder columns, and use the columns control to show or hide fields (Name stays visible).

modal.title: Confirm action
modal.description: This is a lightweight dialog pattern with backdrop and escape to close.
modal.body: Modals work well for destructive confirmations, multi-step flows, or focused tasks without leaving the page.

tabs.overviewBody: Overview content for the current context.

sidebar.contentBody: Sidebar + content split common in dashboards and admin tools.

tooltip.hint: Extra context on hover or keyboard focus

accordion.twoBody: Free returns within 30 days of purchase.

drawer.title: Details
drawer.body: Drawers host secondary tasks, filters, or record details without leaving the page.
